armFromPresale(address).notice: Anyone can arm after presale has started; prevents forgetting.

executeHandover(address).notice: Transfer control to DAO (DAO becomes its own admin; timelock admin = DAO).

extendOnceIfNeeded(uint16).notice: If network trust is low at deadline, dev can extend once (failsafe).

documentation.text: Anyone can arm after presale has started; prevents forgetting.
If network trust is low at deadline, dev can extend once (failsafe).
Transfer control to DAO (DAO becomes its own admin; timelock admin = DAO).
